description.mekanism_extra_modules.phase: Consumes configurable FE while enabled to cancel incoming damage and death events.
description.mekanism_extra_modules.chaos: Requires Phase Guard to be active. Protects against Draconic Evolution Chaos Guardian laser health-write bypasses.
description.mekanism_extra_modules.emerg: Consumes configurable FE on lethal damage to cancel death, restore health, and apply configurable survival effects.
